title: Perplexity AI Sidebar
firstSteps: Run npm run dev to launch the extension
Click the extension icon to open the sidebar
Enter your Perplexity API key (from perplexity.ai/settings/api)
useCases: Perplexity-powered assistant in any browser sidebar
Quick questions answered by Perplexity without leaving the page
Starting point for Perplexity-powered browser extensions
